narrative:
Wesley (precinct in Washington County) has 629 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.3 percentage points.
